title: AI Resume Screener
description: Build an AI pipeline that parses resumes and ranks candidates against job requirements.
learning_objectives:
Design parsing schema
Implement scoring logic
Expose ranking API
resources:
FastAPI Docs | https://fastapi.tiangolo.com/
spaCy Docs | https://spacy.io/usage
task_checklist:
Create project skeleton
Build resume parser
Implement scoring endpoint
Add test suite
detailed_roadmap:
Week 1: Data model and parser
Week 2: Scoring algorithm
Week 3: API hardening
Week 4: Monitoring and optimization
premium_hints:
Use weighted scoring by must-have vs nice-to-have
Cache embeddings to reduce API cost
